Test Case Description: Verify user can login with valid credentials
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to Login page\n2. Enter valid Email & Password\n3. Click "Login" button
Expected Result: User is redirected to Dashboard; JWT token is stored in local storage

Test Case Description: Verify login fails with incorrect password
Test Steps: 1. Enter valid Email\n2. Enter incorrect Password\n3. Click "Login"
Expected Result: System shows error "Invalid credentials"; User remains on login page

Test Case Description: Verify login fails with non-existent email
Test Steps: 1. Enter unregistered Email\n2. Enter any Password\n3. Click "Login"
Expected Result: System shows error "Account not found"

Test Case Description: Verify login fails when fields are blank
Test Steps: 1. Leave Email/Password empty\n2. Click "Login"
Expected Result: System shows validation error "Email/Password is required"

Test Case Description: Verify user can logout successfully
Test Steps: 1. Click Profile icon\n2. Select "Logout"
Expected Result: Session is cleared; User is redirected to Login page

Test Case Description: Verify session persists via token refresh
Preconditions: User session is active but near expiry
Test Steps: 1. Stay idle for token refresh interval\n2. Perform any action (e.g., refresh page)
Expected Result: Session remains active without requiring re-login

Test Case Description: Verify user can update their display name
Test Steps: 1. Go to Profile Settings\n2. Change Name\n3. Save changes
Expected Result: Success message shown; Name reflects change across system

Test Case Description: Verify avatar upload fails for oversized images
Test Steps: 1. Go to Profile Settings\n2. Upload image > 5MB\n3. Save
Expected Result: Error message "File size exceeds limit"

Test Case Description: Verify Admin can create a new STAFF user
Test Steps:
1. Go to Admin > Users
2. Click "New User"
3. Fill details and select role STAFF
4. Submit
Expected Result: User created successfully; appears in user list

Test Case Description: Verify Admin can delete an existing user
Test Steps: 1. Select user from list\n2. Click "Delete"\n3. Confirm deletion
Expected Result: User removed from list; cannot login anymore

Test Case Description: Verify STAFF cannot access User Management
Test Steps: 1. Try to navigate to /admin/users URL directly
Expected Result: System returns 403 Forbidden or redirects to Dashboard

Test Case Description: Verify creation fails with existing email
Preconditions: Email exist@test.com is already in DB
Test Steps: 1. Create new user\n2. Enter exist@test.com\n3. Submit
Expected Result: Error message "Email already exists"

Test Case Description: Verify Admin can disable a user account
Test Steps: 1. Find user\n2. Toggle "Lock" or "Disable" switch
Expected Result: User status becomes Locked; User can no longer login

Test Case Description: Verify Admin can add a new organizational unit
Test Steps:
1. Go to Master Data > Units
2. Click "Add Unit"
3. Enter name
4. Save
Expected Result: Unit appears in dropdowns across the system

Test Case Description: Verify DIRECTOR can update Master Data
Test Steps: 1. Go to Master Data\n2. Edit an entry\n3. Save
Expected Result: Changes are saved successfully

Test Case Description: Verify user creation fails with weak password
Test Steps: 1. Create user\n2. Enter password "abc"\n3. Submit
Expected Result: Error message "Password must be at least 8 characters"

Test Case Description: Verify user can create a new task
Test Steps:
1. Go to Tasks
2. Click "New Task"
3. Enter Title, Assignee, Deadline
4. Submit
Expected Result: Task appears in Task List with status "Pending"

Test Case Description: Verify task creation fails with past date
Test Steps: 1. Enter task details\n2. Set deadline to yesterday\n3. Submit
Expected Result: Error message "Deadline cannot be in the past"

Test Case Description: Verify user can comment on a task
Test Steps: 1. Open Task details\n2. Type comment\n3. Click "Send"
Expected Result: Comment appears in task timeline with timestamp

Test Case Description: Verify user can upload file to task
Test Steps: 1. Open Task details\n2. Upload PDF file\n3. Save
Expected Result: File is listed in "Attachments" section; downloadable

Test Case Description: Verify STAFF cannot delete tasks assigned to others
Test Steps: 1. Find Staff B's task\n2. Attempt to delete
Expected Result: Delete button is hidden or action returns 403

Test Case Description: Verify user can create a calendar event
Test Steps:
1. Go to Events
2. Select date on calendar
3. Fill details
4. Save
Expected Result: Event appears on the dashboard calendar

Test Case Description: Verify user can RSVP to an event
Test Steps: 1. Open Event details\n2. Click "Join"
Expected Result: User is added to participant list

Test Case Description: Verify task title is truncated or limited
Test Steps: 1. Enter 500 character title\n2. Save
Expected Result: System limits input or shows validation error

Test Case Description: Verify system handles overlapping events
Test Steps: 1. Create new event at 10 AM same day
Expected Result: System shows warning "Time slot occupied" or allows with alert

Test Case Description: Verify user can delegate their authority
Test Steps: 1. Go to Delegations\n2. Select delegatee & period\n3. Submit
Expected Result: Delegation active; delegatee gains temporary permissions

Test Case Description: Verify cannot delegate to same person twice
Test Steps: 1. Try to create duplicate delegation
Expected Result: Error "Active delegation already exists for this user"

Test Case Description: Verify Manager can approve a pending request
Test Steps: 1. Go to Approvals\n2. Review request\n3. Click "Approve"
Expected Result: Request status updates to "Approved"; notification sent

Test Case Description: Verify Manager can reject a request with reason
Test Steps: 1. Click "Reject"\n2. Enter reason\n3. Submit
Expected Result: Request status updates to "Rejected"; reason visible to requester

Test Case Description: Verify STAFF cannot approve own requests
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to own request details
Expected Result: Approval buttons (Approve/Reject) are disabled/hidden

Test Case Description: Verify user can revoke delegation
Test Steps: 1. Go to Delegations\n2. Click "Revoke"
Expected Result: Delegation status changes to "Inactive" immediately

Test Case Description: Verify Director can see all pending approvals
Test Steps: 1. Go to Director > Approvals
Expected Result: All unit requests are visible for oversight

Test Case Description: Verify system handles batch approvals
Test Steps: 1. Select all\n2. Click "Approve All"
Expected Result: All selected requests update to "Approved" simultaneously

Test Case Description: Verify Admin can view system activity logs
Test Steps: 1. Go to Admin > Audit Logs
Expected Result: List of actions (Login, Update, Delete) shown with timestamps

Test Case Description: Verify log filtering by user/action
Test Steps: 1. Select User "Staff A" in filter\n2. Apply
Expected Result: Only logs related to "Staff A" are displayed

Test Case Description: Verify Director can generate performance report
Test Steps: 1. Go to Reports\n2. Select "Task Efficiency"\n3. Click "Run"
Expected Result: Report generated with charts and data summary

Test Case Description: Verify Manager can only run report for their unit
Test Steps: 1. Run "Unit Report"
Expected Result: Data in report is limited to "Unit X" only

Test Case Description: Verify STAFF cannot run definitions
Test Steps: 1. Attempt to access /reports/definitions
Expected Result: System returns 403 Forbidden

Test Case Description: Full flow from creation to task completion
Test Steps:
1. Admin creates STAFF user
2. STAFF logs in
3. STAFF updates profile
4. STAFF creates first task
Expected Result: User works correctly through all onboarding steps

Test Case Description: Task requiring approval flow
Test Steps:
1. STAFF creates delegation
2. MANAGER receives notification
3. MANAGER approves delegation
4. STAFF receives confirmation
Expected Result: Delegation becomes active only after Manager's action

Test Case Description: Critical action tracking
Test Steps: 1. STAFF attempts unauthorized delete (failed)\n2. ADMIN checks Audit Logs\n3. ADMIN locks STAFF account
Expected Result: Audit log records the attempt; Admin successfully restricts user

Test Case Description: Announcement and Task monitoring
Test Steps: 1. DIRECTOR posts Announcement\n2. ALL users receive notification\n3. DIRECTOR runs summary report
Expected Result: All users notified; report reflects real-time status

Test Case Description: Delegation permissions verification
Test Steps:
1. MGR delegates to STAFF
2. STAFF logs in
3. STAFF accesses MGR-only report
4. STAFF approves a sub-request
Expected Result: STAFF successfully performs MGR actions during period
